elements.name: Title
texts: "For this is Lough Derg, St. Patrick’s Purgatory"

elements.name: Description
texts: The poetry of Patrick Kavanagh's 'Lough Derg', detailing a visit in 1941

elements.name: Rights
texts: Citation for the purposes of criticism

elements.name: Text
texts:
“For this is Lough Derg, St. Patrick’s Purgatory.
He came to this island-acre of limestone once
To be shut off the smug too-faithful. The story
Is different now.
Solicitors praying for cushy jobs.”
